headline: OpenAI CEO Altman's track record shows mixed results on AI predictions
body: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's public predictions about AI advancement and deployment are facing scrutiny as observers assess their accuracy over time. Meanwhile, OpenAI continues navigating regulatory pressures across states while managing technical shifts like deprecating its Agent Builder product. For healthcare AI adopters, this moment underscores the importance of evaluating vendor stability and realistic timelines rather than relying on executive prognostication when planning EHR integration or clinical workflow automation. The company's acknowledgment that AI token costs are becoming problematic signals potential pricing volatility that could affect healthcare organizations' AI infrastructure budgets and ROI calculations going forward.
